title: Energy stocks suffer broad beating as crude oil futures continue to sink

The SPDR Energy Select Sector ETF XLE, -0.36% slumped 3.2% in premarket trading, with all 21 components selling off, as crude futures shed 3.4% and while futures ES00, -1.42% for the S&P 500 SPX, -0.84% fell 1.4%.
